FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Stores a fast string representation of the Git hash for flags.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves performance by quickly accessing the version of the flag repository.

FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.mechanism: Uses a fast string format to record the timestamp of when a flag was flipped.
FStringFlipTimeStampFastString.purpose: Enhances speed in determining when changes to flags occurred.

DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Maintains a dynamic string version of the Git hash for flags.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Allows for real-time updates and tracking of flag versions.

DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.mechanism: Keeps a dynamic string that logs the timestamp of flag changes.
DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString.purpose: Enables immediate access to the timing of flag modifications.
